goal: Replace StubNetwork with production gRPC transport for OpenRaft RPC communication between nodes

phases.name: Error Handling Infrastructure
phases.description: Define network error types and error conversion chains for gRPC communication

tasks.name: Define NetworkError types
tasks.notes: Completed. NetworkError enum with variants: ConnectionFailed, Timeout, RpcFailed, Serialization, Deserialization, NodeNotFound, MaxRetriesExceeded. Includes is_transient() method and comprehensive tests.

tasks.name: Error type conversions
tasks.notes: Completed. Conversion chain: tonic::Status → NetworkError → openraft::RPCError. Helper functions with node context. 35+ tests covering all gRPC status codes.

phases.name: Protobuf Foundation
phases.description: Define protobuf schema, generate Rust types, and implement type conversions

tasks.name: Define Raft protobuf schema
tasks.notes: Completed 2025-11-03. raft.proto (246 lines) defines VoteRequest, VoteResponse, AppendEntriesRequest, AppendEntriesResponse, InstallSnapshotRequest, InstallSnapshotResponse, LogEntry, and RaftService.

tasks.name: Generate Rust types from proto
tasks.notes: Completed 2025-11-03. tonic-build generates Rust types, 20 proto validation tests passing.

tasks.name: Protobuf type conversions
tasks.notes: Stubs created in src/proto/conversions.rs, 36 tests written in tests/proto_conversions_test.rs. Awaiting implementation of bidirectional conversions between protobuf and OpenRaft types.

tasks.name: Test proto serialization
tasks.notes: Round-trip serialization tests. Verify binary encoding size is reasonable.

phases.name: gRPC Server Implementation
phases.description: Implement gRPC service for receiving Raft RPC messages

tasks.name: Implement Raft gRPC service
tasks.notes: RaftService struct implements raft_proto::raft_server::Raft. vote, append_entries, install_snapshot handlers.

tasks.name: Implement vote request handler
tasks.notes: Compares term with local state, returns vote_granted if candidate log is up-to-date.

tasks.name: Implement append entries handler
tasks.notes: Validates prev_log_index and prev_log_term, appends new entries, updates commit index.

tasks.name: Implement install snapshot handler
tasks.notes: Receives snapshot data chunks, assembles into complete snapshot, applies to state machine.

tasks.name: Manage connection lifecycle
tasks.notes: Server binds to port 7379, graceful shutdown on SIGTERM, connection count logging.

phases.name: gRPC Client Implementation
phases.description: Implement client for sending Raft RPC to peers

tasks.name: Implement gRPC client wrapper
tasks.notes: GrpcClient implements Clone + Send + Sync. Can connect to server at address. Methods for each RPC type.

tasks.name: Implement connection pool
tasks.notes: HashMap<NodeId, GrpcClient>, lazy connection establishment, connection reuse.

tasks.name: Implement retry with backoff
tasks.notes: Max 3 retry attempts, exponential backoff (1s, 2s, 4s), returns error after all retries exhausted.

tasks.name: Implement timeout handling
tasks.notes: Vote/AppendEntries timeout: 10 seconds, InstallSnapshot timeout: 30 seconds, Connection timeout: 5 seconds.

phases.name: RaftNetwork Integration
phases.description: Implement openraft::RaftNetwork trait to replace StubNetwork

tasks.name: Implement RaftNetwork trait
tasks.notes: send_vote(), send_append_entries(), send_install_snapshot() call gRPC client. Returns Result with proper error types.

tasks.name: Replace StubNetwork
tasks.notes: StubNetworkFactory replaced with GrpcNetworkFactory. Existing tests still pass.

tasks.name: Integration tests
tasks.notes: 2-node cluster forms, leader election works via gRPC, log replication works via gRPC.
